name: Cuatro Mismo
description: A light, easy-drinking highball of BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and soda water finished with lime. As the story goes, tourists in Cuba saw locals drinking BACARDÍ and soda water, so they ordered the same thing. It’s the “I’ll have what she’s having” of the cocktail world.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum.
Add the soda water and stir well before serving.
searchable_text: Cuatro Mismo main rum BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum A light, easy-drinking highball of BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and soda water finished with lime. As the story goes, tourists in Cuba saw locals drinking BACARDÍ and soda water, so they ordered the same thing. It’s the “I’ll have what she’s having” of the cocktail world. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, 100 ml soda water, ice, lime wedge recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum. Add the soda water and stir well before serving. Garnish with a lime wedge.
